current_role.de:
💼 Aktuelle Position: Finanzbuchhalter bei modal3 Logistik GmbH (seit Mai 2025)
📍 Hamburg, Deutschland (Hybrid)

Aufgaben: Vollständige Finanzbuchhaltung (Debitoren, Kreditoren, Sachkonten), Umsatzsteuervoranmeldung, BWA-Erstellung, Abstimmung mit Steuerberater.
Tools: SelectLine, Modality, ELO.

📜 Parallel: IHK-Zertifizierung zur Fachkraft für Buchführung (Prüfung: März 2026).
current_role.en:
💼 Current Position: Financial Accountant at modal3 Logistik GmbH (since May 2025)
📍 Hamburg, Germany (Hybrid)

Responsibilities: Complete financial accounting (AR, AP, General Ledger), VAT reporting, BWA preparation, coordination with tax advisor.
Tools: SelectLine, Modality, ELO.

📜 Parallel: IHK Certified Bookkeeping Specialist certification (exam: March 2026).
current_role.ro:
💼 Poziția actuală: Contabil Financiar la modal3 Logistik GmbH (din mai 2025)
📍 Hamburg, Germania (Hibrid)

Responsabilități: Contabilitate financiară completă (creanțe, datorii, registru general), declarații TVA, pregătire BWA, coordonare cu consilierul fiscal.
Instrumente: SelectLine, Modality, ELO.

📜 Paralel: Certificare IHK Specialist Contabilitate (examen: martie 2026).

projects.de:
🚀 Aktuelle Projekte:

1️⃣ GDS – Geometrodynamic Semantics
Ein experimentelles Forschungsprojekt, das geometrische Algebra mit semantischen Räumen verbindet (Julia, Python).

2️⃣ GENESIS – Cognitive Computing Platform
Ein Multi-Agenten-System für forensische Buchhaltung und automatisierte Compliance-Prüfung (Go, Kotlin, Python).

3️⃣ ProfitMinds – E-Commerce-Marke
Amazon FBA & eBay-Handel mit Fokus auf Produktrecherche, Compliance und Skalierung.

4️⃣ MindHafen – Human + AI Music
Multilinguales Musikprojekt (Spotify + YouTube) mit Fokus auf Deep Work, Motivation und Creative Production.

📎 Details: me-mateescu.de/projects
projects.en:
🚀 Current Projects:

1️⃣ GDS – Geometrodynamic Semantics
An experimental research project connecting geometric algebra with semantic spaces (Julia, Python).

2️⃣ GENESIS – Cognitive Computing Platform
A multi-agent system for forensic accounting and automated compliance auditing (Go, Kotlin, Python).

3️⃣ ProfitMinds – E-Commerce Brand
Amazon FBA & eBay commerce focused on product research, compliance, and scaling.

4️⃣ MindHafen – Human + AI Music
A multilingual music project (Spotify + YouTube) focused on deep-work, motivation, and creative production.

📎 Details: me-mateescu.de/en/projects
projects.ro:
🚀 Proiecte Curente:

1️⃣ GDS – Geometrodynamic Semantics
Un proiect experimental de cercetare ce conectează algebra geometrică cu spații semantice (Julia, Python).

2️⃣ GENESIS – Cognitive Computing Platform
Un sistem multi-agent pentru contabilitate forensică și audit automat de conformitate (Go, Kotlin, Python).

3️⃣ ProfitMinds – Brand E-Commerce
Comerț Amazon FBA & eBay cu focus pe cercetare de produs, conformitate și scalare.

4️⃣ MindHafen – Human + AI Music
Proiect muzical multilingv (Spotify + YouTube) cu focus pe deep work, motivație și producție creativă.

📎 Detalii: me-mateescu.de/ro/projects
